active_goal: Focused Tahoe/macOS modern UI alignment pass for issue #5

features.title: Use system-provided macOS chrome for primary controls and status
features.evidence: AgendumNeo/AgendumNeoApp.swift configures the main WindowGroup with .windowToolbarStyle(.unified). AgendumNeo/Views/RootView.swift uses SwiftUI toolbar content for namespace and refresh controls, plus a bottom safeAreaInset with .bar background. AgendumNeo/AppModel.swift reloads namespaces when refresh is invoked before an active namespace exists. Build and test succeeded on 2026-05-15.
features.notes: Matches Apple guidance to rely on standard toolbar windows and controls for the new design rather than custom content-layer glass or manual corner rounding.

features.title: Make inbox rows fit modern compact macOS windows
features.evidence: AgendumNeo/Views/ItemRow.swift replaces fixed column widths with adaptive title/metadata rows. Build and test succeeded on 2026-05-15.
features.notes: Keeps the inbox usable in the existing small window and menu-bar window sizes.

features.title: Keep Tahoe alignment compatible with current CI runner
features.evidence: project.yml sets deploymentTarget.macOS and MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET to 15.0 after PR #11 CI reported that macOS 15.7.4 cannot test a macOS 26.0 test bundle. xcodegen generate and xcodebuild test succeeded on 2026-05-15 after the change.
features.notes: Tahoe alignment is retained through standard SwiftUI UI patterns rather than a macOS 26 deployment floor.
